standard_live_change.description: Routine live mutation that may be requested by an agent or operator, but still requires human approval and evidence planning.

sensitive_live_change.description: Higher-risk host, provisioning, security, or boundary-changing mutation that must stay operator-initiated and human-approved.

install-proxmox.description: Install and converge the Proxmox package path on the Debian host.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used to reach the host as ops.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=install-proxmox passes
make validate passes on the repo state being applied
The host is reachable and the change window is approved before package mutation starts

evidence.notes: Record the source commit, pveversion verification, and any package or reboot observations.

stop_conditions: Stop immediately if preflight, apt repository setup, or package installation fails.
Stop if post-apply verification does not show the expected Proxmox version.
rollback_guidance: Do not continue with later host mutations until the package path is stable.
Revert by reapplying the last known-good repo state or follow the Proxmox install runbook for host recovery.

configure-network.description: Converge the host bridge, forwarding, and NAT model for guest networking.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for the host network converge.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-network passes
make validate passes before the apply
Operators confirm the host networking blast radius and guest outage tolerance

evidence.notes: Record the source commit plus verification of vmbr0, vmbr10, forwarding, and guest egress behavior.

stop_conditions: Stop if interface rendering, nftables update, or connectivity verification fails.
Stop if the host loses expected management reachability during the change.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good network configuration from version control before retrying.
Use documented host access recovery steps instead of ad hoc retries if management access degrades.

configure-ingress.description: Converge host-side public ingress forwarding to the NGINX VM.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host ingress changes.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-ingress passes
make validate passes before the apply
The NGINX guest is healthy enough to receive forwarded public traffic

evidence.notes: Record the forwarding change and verification for TCP 80 and 443 to nginx-lv3.

stop_conditions: Stop if forwarding rules fail to render or verification shows traffic is no longer reaching the edge VM.
Stop if firewall or NAT changes affect unrelated management traffic.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good ingress rule set before attempting another live change.
Do not layer DNS or edge-publication changes on top of a broken host ingress state.

configure-edge-publication.description: Publish repo-managed public hostnames and routes at the NGINX edge.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-edge-publication passes
make validate passes before the apply
Service topology and DNS intent are already represented in repo-managed data

evidence.notes: Record the source commit and HTTP or HTTPS verification for the affected public hostnames.

stop_conditions: Stop if NGINX config validation or publication verification fails.
Stop if certificate or hostname mismatches appear after the change.
rollback_guidance: Reapply the last known-good edge configuration from version control.
Keep failed publication attempts out of DNS or user-facing announcements until verification is clean.

configure-tailscale.description: Converge host Tailscale installation and subnet-router behavior.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host Tailscale changes.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-tailscale passes
make validate passes before the apply
Route advertisement and management-access consequences are reviewed before the change

evidence.notes: Record the advertised routes, auth state outcome, and operator reachability checks.

stop_conditions: Stop if package installation, auth state, or route advertisement fails.
Stop if the change removes expected private management access.
rollback_guidance: Return to the last known-good Tailscale configuration before further access changes.
Use documented break-glass access only long enough to restore the managed state.

provision-guests.description: Provision or update the declared Proxmox template and guest fleet.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for the host-side Proxmox guest operations.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=provision-guests passes
make validate passes before the apply
Guest identity inputs such as VMID, IP, and MAC are already committed and reviewed

evidence.notes: Record created or updated VMIDs plus verification that guest definitions match the repo state.

stop_conditions: Stop if template preparation, VM create or update, or cloud-init refresh fails.
Stop if guest identity drift such as MAC or static-network mismatch is detected.
rollback_guidance: Do not keep partially converged guest identity changes without documenting the repair path.
Restore the prior guest definition or follow the netplan MAC-drift runbook before retrying.

harden-access.description: Converge host-side Linux and Proxmox access controls for routine operations.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host access baseline changes.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=harden-access passes
make validate passes before the apply
Operator access recovery is understood before touching SSH or privilege boundaries

evidence.notes: Record the access changes plus verification of ops login, sudo, and expected Proxmox identities.

stop_conditions: Stop if SSH or sudo verification fails after the converge.
Stop if the change would strand operators outside the documented break-glass path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good access model from the repo before retrying.
Use the documented break-glass account only to recover the managed access path.

harden-guest-access.description: Converge guest-side non-root SSH and sudo access controls.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path to reach guests.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=harden-guest-access passes
make validate passes before the apply
Guest access defaults are already described in repo-managed inventory

evidence.notes: Record the source commit and verification that managed guests accept ops-based access.

stop_conditions: Stop if guest login or sudo verification fails on any targeted VM.
Stop if the jump-path assumptions no longer match the current guest reachability.
rollback_guidance: Restore the prior guest access baseline before additional guest mutations.
Document any guest-specific repair needed instead of masking access drift with root logins.

harden-security.description: Converge host firewall, ACME, TFA, and notification security controls.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host security convergence.

inputs.name: hetzner_dns_api_token
inputs.description: DNS token used for ACME and managed DNS interactions.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=harden-security passes
make validate passes before the apply
Firewall source lists, notification routing, and ACME expectations have been reviewed

evidence.notes: Record firewall, ACME, notifications, and TFA verification together with the generated TOTP state outcome.

stop_conditions: Stop if host firewall verification, certificate issuance, or notification routing fails.
Stop if the change removes expected access to SSH or the Proxmox web UI.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good security config before proceeding with other host changes.
Treat partial firewall or TFA state as an incident to repair, not as a stable endpoint.

provision-api-access.description: Provision or rotate the durable Proxmox API automation identity and token payload.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for host-side API identity changes.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=provision-api-access passes
make validate passes before the apply
Token owner, scope, and storage location are reviewed before generating new credentials

evidence.notes: Record the identity verification and whether fresh token payload material was generated.

stop_conditions: Stop if user, role, or token verification fails.
Stop if the controller-side generated token payload does not match the repo contract.
rollback_guidance: Prefer regenerating or reapplying the managed API identity state instead of manual drift.
Revoke partially created credentials if the verification step fails.

converge-monitoring.description: Converge the monitoring VM, Grafana dashboards, and Proxmox metric-server path.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-monitoring passes
make validate passes before the apply
Grafana and metric-server expectations are already encoded in the repo state

evidence.notes: Record dashboard import, metric-server, and service availability verification.

stop_conditions: Stop if Grafana, InfluxDB, or Proxmox metric-server verification fails.
Stop if dashboard provisioning or token distribution drifts from the repo state.
rollback_guidance: Reapply the last known-good monitoring state from version control before retrying.
Do not mask broken telemetry with manual dashboard edits that are not committed.

converge-ntopng.description: Converge host-local ntopng capture on the Proxmox host and publish the operator-only Tailscale proxy path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-ntopng passes
make validate passes before the apply
The operator-only access boundary and monitored bridge interfaces have been reviewed

evidence.notes: Record runtime health, private proxy verification, and monitored-interface visibility from the managed ntopng API.

stop_conditions: Stop if the ntop repository bootstrap, service startup, or private proxy verification fails.
Stop if the change exposes ntopng outside the intended private operator path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good host state from version control before retrying.
Keep any emergency package or firewall rollback documented so the repo remains the source of truth.

converge-docker-runtime.description: Converge the Docker runtime VM baseline and runtime packages.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-docker-runtime passes
make validate passes before the apply
Runtime package and daemon changes are reviewed before restarting services

evidence.notes: Record the runtime converge plus verification that Docker is healthy on docker-runtime-lv3.

stop_conditions: Stop if package, repository, or daemon verification fails.
Stop if runtime restarts leave Docker unavailable or misconfigured.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good runtime configuration before further workload changes.
Keep application-level remediation separate from runtime baseline rollback.

converge-postgres-vm.description: Converge the PostgreSQL VM baseline and managed database settings.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-postgres-vm passes
make validate passes before the apply
Database listeners and access expectations are already encoded in the repo state

evidence.notes: Record the PostgreSQL converge plus verification of service health and expected listener state.

stop_conditions: Stop if PostgreSQL config validation or service health verification fails.
Stop if access paths drift from the documented private-only model.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good PostgreSQL config before retrying.
Do not compensate for failed baseline changes with manual database-side drift.

converge-mail-platform.description: Converge the managed mail platform runtime, DNS, and observability surfaces.

inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

inputs.name: hetzner_dns_api_token
inputs.description: DNS token used for managed mail publication.

inputs.name: mail_platform_brevo_api_key
inputs.description: Fallback resend credential used by the managed mail gateway.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-mail-platform passes
make validate passes before the apply
Mail domains, DNS, and delivery blast radius are reviewed before changing the live stack

evidence.notes: Record runtime, DNS, and mail-flow verification together with any fallback resend observations.

stop_conditions: Stop if the runtime converge, DNS publication, or send or receive verification fails.
Stop if the change affects unrelated ingress or breaks the documented notification path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good mail stack state from version control before retrying.
If external mail flow is impaired, revert promptly instead of stacking follow-up changes.

converge-openbao.description: Converge the private OpenBao runtime, seeded auth identities, Transit, and PostgreSQL dynamic-credential integration.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key used through the Proxmox jump path.

inputs.name: mail_platform_brevo_api_key
inputs.description: Seed secret used to bootstrap the mail-platform path inside OpenBao.

inputs.name: proxmox_api_token_payload
inputs.description: Scoped Proxmox API token payload seeded for controller automation access.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-openbao passes
make validate passes before the apply
Recovery handling for init payloads and unseal material is reviewed before any live rollout

evidence.notes: Record runtime health, bootstrap artifact generation, auth role verification, and PostgreSQL dynamic-credential checks.

stop_conditions: Stop if OpenBao init, unseal, auth role creation, or Transit verification fails.
Stop if generated controller-local artifacts are incomplete or do not match the documented contract.
rollback_guidance: Reapply or rotate the managed OpenBao bootstrap state instead of leaving partially initialized secret authority data behind.
Do not route new workloads through OpenBao until the converge and recovery contract verify cleanly.

Stop if the deployment drifts from the repo-managed monitor definition path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good Uptime Kuma deployment state before retrying.
Keep monitor bootstrap or UI remediation separate from the runtime rollback decision.

make validate passes before the apply

Stop if the change risks locking operators out of the documented access path.
rollback_guidance: Restore the prior SSH trust model before retrying a CA rollout.
Treat partial trust updates as an access incident that must be repaired explicitly.

Stop if the converge would leave Windmill reachable but without the expected repo-managed bootstrap state.
rollback_guidance: Restore the last known-good Windmill runtime state before retrying.

make validate passes before a mutating API action
The requested action is one of the repo-managed Uptime Kuma operations

stop_conditions: Stop if the API session is invalid or the requested action returns an error.
Stop if the managed monitor set diverges from the repo definition after the action.
rollback_guidance: Use the repo-managed ensure-monitors path or the last known-good session state to recover.

Stop if the change compromises expected restore or backup access paths.

configure-backups.description: Legacy external CIFS backup path retained only as an explicitly blocked contract.

inputs.name: bootstrap_ssh_private_key
inputs.description: Controller-side SSH key for the legacy host backup path.

inputs.name: proxmox_backup_cifs_server
inputs.description: Legacy blocked CIFS server input retained only to explain why the path is blocked.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-backups currently fails because the path is intentionally blocked
Use ADR 0029 and configure-backup-vm instead of reviving this superseded path
Only revisit this contract through a new ADR or explicit repository decision

evidence.notes: No live apply should proceed while the workflow remains blocked; keep any future override decision explicit.

stop_conditions: Stop immediately because the current workflow catalog marks this path blocked.
Stop if an operator attempts to bypass the blocked preflight with ad hoc shell commands.
rollback_guidance: Do not use this path for live backup configuration in the current platform model.
Move to the PBS-based backup workflow instead of forcing the superseded CIFS path.

database-dns.description: Publish the managed PostgreSQL tailnet DNS record through the Hetzner DNS API.

inputs.description: DNS token used for the managed tailnet record publication.

expected_preconditions: make preflight WORKFLOW=database-dns passes
make validate passes before the apply
The topology catalog already represents the intended private DNS record

evidence.notes: Record the published DNS record plus verification that the managed tailnet hostname resolves as expected.

stop_conditions: Stop if the Hetzner API request fails or the resulting record does not match the repo state.
Stop if the change would replace the intended private-only DNS target with a broader exposure.
rollback_guidance: Reapply the last known-good DNS state from the repo before retrying.
Keep private database publication changes under the managed playbook instead of manual provider edits.
